ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in KB */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current version of the document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the document */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the document */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level required to view the document (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES document_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., board member, staff, external stakeholder) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for access */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a document */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., author, department) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_metadata_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role has administrative privileges */,
  "default_access_level" TEXT /* Default access level for documents for this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
